model.description: MiMo • The flagship foundation for the agentic era, built for complex, long-horizon, multi-step agentic tasks.

pick.rationale: Florida is the superior team with elite metrics (KenPom rank 4, Torvik rank 4) and a 26-7 record, featuring top-10 offense and top-5 defense. Iowa, while a solid Big Ten team with good offensive efficiency (rank 29-31), lacks Florida's overall balance and defensive prowess. The Gators' experience as a 1-seed and their ability to control tempo should overcome Iowa's offensive firepower, though the Hawkeyes' 21-12 record and tournament experience make this a competitive matchup.

reasoningStep.title: Florida vs Iowa Round of 32 Analysis
reasoningStep.summary: Florida holds significant analytical advantages over Iowa in both offensive and defensive efficiency, with a substantial gap in overall team quality.
evidence: Florida ranks 4th in both KenPom and Torvik ratings with a 26-7 record, while Iowa ranks 25th/26th with a 21-12 record.
Florida's offensive efficiency ranks 9th-11th nationally compared to Iowa's 29th-31st, and Florida's defensive efficiency ranks 5th vs Iowa's 35th.
Florida's Alex Condon suffered an ankle injury earlier but appears available for the tournament based on later Sweet 16 reports.
Iowa's path to victory would require exceptional offensive performance against Florida's elite defense, which is unlikely given the talent disparity.
Florida's experience as a 1-seed and recent tournament success (defending national champions) provides a psychological edge.

result.text: March Madness: Full 2026 NCAA Tournament bracket, seedings, matchups Skip to main content Home Schedule Football Basketball Baseball Recruiting SEC Sports Odds Newsletter GatorSports.com College Sports Wire USA TODAY Sports 2026 NCAA Tournament bracket, seedings, matchups for March Madness Adam Dubbin Gators Wire This story was updated because an earlier version included an inaccuracy. March Madness is finally here and the 2026 NCAA Tournament bracket is set. Over the next three weeks, the field of 68 teams will be whittled round by round until a national champion is crowned. Last year's winners, the Florida Gators , enter the Big Dance with a No. 1 seed, as well as the Duke Blue Devils , Michigan Wolverines and Arizona Wildcats. The NCAA Tournament begins on Tuesday, March 17, with the First Four in Dayton. The round of 64 kicks off on Thursday, March 19, with play continuing at the regional level until the Final Four, which will be played on Saturday, April 4, at Lucas Oil Stadium in Indianapolis. The NCAA Tournament championship game will be played at the same venue on Monday, April 6. Below is a complete look at this year's March Madness bracket. 2026 NCAA Tournament bracket East Region Greenville, S.C No. 1 Duke (32-2) vs. No. 16 Siena (23-11) No. 8 Ohio State (21-12) vs. TCU (22-11) San Diego No. 5 St. John's (28-6) vs. Northern Iowa (23-12) No. 4 Kansas (23-10) vs. No. 13 Cal Baptist (25-8) Buffalo, N.Y. March Madness is finally here and the 2026 NCAA Tournament bracket is set. Over the next three weeks, the field of 68 teams will be whittled round by round until a national champion is crowned. Last year's winners, the Florida Gators , enter the Big Dance with a No. 1 seed, as well as the Duke Blue Devils , Michigan Wolverines and Arizona Wildcats. The NCAA Tournament begins on Tuesday, March 17, with the First Four in Dayton. The round of 64 kicks off on Thursday, March 19, with play continuing at the regional level until the Final Four, which will be played on Saturday, April 4, at Lucas Oil Stadium in Indianapolis. The NCAA Tournament championship game will be played at the same venue on Monday, April 6.
